title: Break-even Analysis: Calculate the break-even point in units if fixed costs are...
summary: Calculate the break-even point in units by dividing fixed costs by the contribution margin per unit.
prompt: Calculate the break-even point in units if fixed costs are $100,000 and the contribution margin per unit is $25.
solution: Break-even Point in Units = Fixed Costs / Contribution Margin per Unit = $100,000 / $25 = 4,000 units. This calculation is vital for assessing how many units need to be sold to cover all costs (Page 47).
